subject: Cloud Computing
title: The Future of Cloud Competition
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Future of Cloud Competition.

hook.text: AI is reshaping cloud competition. The provider with the most GPU capacity wins the next decade.

buildup.text: Microsoft leads with OpenAI integration. Google has Gemini. AWS has Bedrock. Each bets on different AI strategies.

discovery.text: Specialized AI cloud startups like CoreWeave are growing by focusing purely on GPU compute.

twist.text: The next cloud giant might not sell general infrastructure at all. It might sell AI as a service.

climax.text: Cloud competition is intensifying, not settling. AI has reopened the race in ways nobody expected.

punchline.text: The cloud war isn't over. AI just changed the battlefield.

quiz.question: How is AI reshaping cloud competition?
options: Demand for GPU compute is creating new competitive advantages and even new cloud companies
AI has made all cloud providers identical in their offerings
AI reduced the need for cloud computing entirely
